
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the plate

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] I can see several objects on what appears to be a surface. From the current position and \[visual perception\]\(\#visual\-perception\), I need to look more closely to identify which object is the plate. Let me look at the scene more carefully to identify the plate among the objects.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": -0.1,
  "y": 0.9,
  "z": -1.1
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982753882, 'end': 1762982761732, 'elapsed': 7850}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1078.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 2064871, 't1': 2065949, 'elapsed': 1078}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6372, completion=156, total=6528
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the updated visual perception, I can now see what appears to be a plate, which is likely object 27 based on its flat, circular shape. Looking at the \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\), object 27 is positioned at x=\-0.17, y=0.9, z=\-1.1. I will now attempt to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "27"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982762817, 'end': 1762982774466, 'elapsed': 11649}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1879.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 2077605, 't1': 2079484, 'elapsed': 1879}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8150, completion=140, total=8290
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Object 27 was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=\-0.7, y=0.08, z=\-1.1\) and picked it successfully.

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the plate \(object 27\). The system first moved me to a reachable position, and then I was able to grasp the object as requested.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762982776350, 'end': 1762982783754, 'elapsed': 7404}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=8338, completion=41, total=8379
</details>

</details>
